title: More Actions: squid tentacles
description: This mod adds something that was sorely missing in vanilla survival: tentacles that drop from squids. Now, instead of useless ink sacs, you can get useful and nutritious food. Squids are no longer such a useless mob!
body:
This small but very useful mod eliminates a long-standing flaw in vanilla Minecraft survival: the uselessness of squid. Now these sea creatures will no longer be just mobile sources of ink sacs, but will become a full-fledged and valuable food source in the early and mid-game!
What it adds: squid tentacles, cooked squid tentacle, glowing tentacle, golden glowing tentacle, sea salad, and Tom Yum soup!
